subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in God and testified to His words! Whatsoever existeth in the realm of being is destined ultimately to perish and vanish, except [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالله و صدق بکلماته آنچه در عرصه وجود است عاقبت فانی و مفقود مگر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
